_ai: AI fills this. Derived from: architecture.json + non-functional-requirements.json + product.json (pricing tiers). Do not edit manually.

region.rationale: UK-based target market; data residency for GDPR compliance; Enterprise tenants can elect a dedicated region

backend.containerisation: Docker — each microservice packaged as a container image
backend.orchestration: Amazon ECS on AWS Fargate (serverless container runtime, no EC2 fleet to manage)
backend.serviceDiscovery: AWS Cloud Map + Application Load Balancer per service

frontend.hosting: Vercel (tenant booking pages, tenant admin portal)
frontend.cdn: CloudFront for static assets and API acceleration
frontend.tenantBookingPage: Per-tenant subdomain routing (e.g. acme.bookvault.com) — supported from Pro plan; custom domain from Enterprise

starterAndPro.tenancyModel: Shared cluster, Pool model with RLS

database.backups: Automated daily snapshots retained 35 days; WAL archived to S3 for point-in-time recovery
database.rls: Row-Level Security enabled on all tenant-scoped tables; safe-by-default (null context returns zero rows)

cache.type: Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 7 (cluster mode enabled)
usedFor: Idempotency key lookups for booking deduplication
Session tokens for tenant admin portal
cache.encryption: TLS in transit; AES-256 at rest

messageBus.topology: One SNS topic per event type; one SQS FIFO queue per (consuming service × event type); MessageGroupId = tenant_id for per-tenant ordering and noisy-neighbour isolation
messageBus.dlq: Separate SQS DLQ per consumer queue; maxReceiveCount = 4 before routing to DLQ

buckets.name: bookvault-exports
buckets.purpose: Tenant data export archives (FR012). Signed URLs expire after 24 hours.

buckets.name: bookvault-event-archive
buckets.purpose: Long-term event log archive for replay and compliance
buckets.lifecycle: Lifecycle transition to S3 Glacier after 90 days

secretsManager.rotation: Automatic rotation via Lambda for DB credentials; manual rotation with zero-downtime blue-green for API keys

components.logs: Grafana Loki (structured log aggregation from all ECS tasks)
components.traces: Grafana Tempo (distributed tracing via OpenTelemetry SDK in each service)
components.dashboards: Grafana (SLO dashboards, DLQ depth, booking funnel, per-tenant metrics)

networking.apiGateway: Custom Spring Cloud Gateway service (api-gateway) — JWT validation, tenant_id injection, rate limiting, correlation_id generation
networking.tls: TLS 1.3 on all ingress; internal service-to-service via AWS VPC private subnets
networking.vpc: Private subnets for all compute and data services; public subnet for ALB only

usedFor: Enabling SMS notifications per tenant (Pro plan gate)
